opencli.message: OpenCLI artifact has a non-publishable 'info.title' value.

xmldoc.message:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<Model>
  <!--NEW-->
  <Command Name="new" IsBranch="true" 
Settings="Spectre.Console.Cli.CommandSettings">
    <!--WEBAPP-->
    <Command Name="webapp" IsBranch="false" 
ClrType="Substratum.CreateWebAppCommand" 
Settings="Substratum.CreateWebAppSettings">
      <Parameters>
        <Option Short="" Long="name" Value="NULL" Required="false" Kind="scalar"
ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>The project name (PascalCase)</Description>
        </Option>
      </Parameters>
    </Command>
    <!--ENDPOINT-->
    <Command Name="endpoint" IsBranch="false" 
ClrType="Substratum.CreateEndpointCommand" 
Settings="Substratum.CreateEndpointSettings">
      <Parameters>
        <Option Short="" Long="group" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>The group name (PascalCase, e.g. Orders or 
Authentication/Mobile)</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="method" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>The HTTP method (Get, Post, Put, Delete, 
Patch)</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="name" Value="NULL" Required="false" Kind="scalar"
ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>The endpoint name (PascalCase, e.g. 
CreateOrder)</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="permission" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>The permission name (e.g. OrdersCreate)</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="response-type" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>The response type (SingleResult or 
PaginatedResult)</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="route" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>The route pattern (e.g. /orders, 
/orders/{id})</Description>
        </Option>
      </Parameters>
    </Command>
    <!--EVENT-->
    <Command Name="event" IsBranch="false" 
ClrType="Substratum.CreateEventCommand" 
Settings="Substratum.CreateEventSettings">
      <Parameters>
        <Option Short="" Long="endpoint" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>The endpoint name (PascalCase, e.g. Login, 
CreateOrder)</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="group" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>The group name (PascalCase, e.g. Orders or 
Authentication/Mobile)</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="name" Value="NULL" Required="false" Kind="scalar"
ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>The event name (PascalCase, e.g. UserCreated, 
OrderPlaced)</Description>
        </Option>
      </Parameters>
    </Command>
    <!--JOB-->
    <Command Name="job" IsBranch="false" ClrType="Substratum.CreateJobCommand" 
Settings="Substratum.CreateJobSettings">
      <Parameters>
        <Option Short="" Long="endpoint" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>The endpoint name (PascalCase, e.g. Login, CreateOrder). 
Required for Endpoint scope.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="group" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>The group name (PascalCase, e.g. Orders or 
Authentication/Mobile). Required for Group and Endpoint scope.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="name" Value="NULL" Required="false" Kind="scalar"
ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>The job name (PascalCase, e.g. SendWelcomeEmail, 
ProcessPayment)</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="scope" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>The job scope (Global, Group, or Endpoint)</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="type" Value="NULL" Required="false" Kind="scalar"
ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>The job type (Simple or WithArgs)</Description>
        </Option>
      </Parameters>
    </Command>
    <!--ENTITY-->
    <Command Name="entity" IsBranch="false" 
ClrType="Substratum.CreateEntityCommand" 
Settings="Substratum.CreateEntitySettings">
      <Parameters>
        <Option Short="" Long="name" Value="NULL" Required="false" Kind="scalar"
ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>The entity name (PascalCase)</Description>
        </Option>
      </Parameters>
    </Command>
  </Command>
  <!--MIGRATIONS-->
  <Command Name="migrations" IsBranch="true" 
Settings="Spectre.Console.Cli.CommandSettings">
    <!--ADD-->
    <Command Name="add" IsBranch="false" 
ClrType="Substratum.AddMigrationCommand" 
Settings="Substratum.AddMigrationSettings">
      <Parameters>
        <Argument Name="name" Position="0" Required="false" Kind="scalar" 
ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>The name of the migration</Description>
        </Argument>
        <Option Short="c" Long="context" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>The DbContext class name (required when multiple 
DbContexts exist)</Description>
        </Option>
      </Parameters>
    </Command>
  </Command>
  <!--DATABASE-->
  <Command Name="database" IsBranch="true" 
Settings="Spectre.Console.Cli.CommandSettings">
    <!--UPDATE-->
    <Command Name="update" IsBranch="false" 
ClrType="Substratum.UpdateDatabaseCommand" 
Settings="Substratum.UpdateDatabaseSettings">
      <Parameters>
        <Option Short="c" Long="context" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>The DbContext class name (required when multiple 
DbContexts exist)</Description>
        </Option>
      </Parameters>
    </Command>
    <!--SQL-->
    <Command Name="sql" IsBranch="false" ClrType="Substratum.GenerateSqlCommand"
Settings="Substratum.GenerateSqlSettings">
      <Parameters>
        <Option Short="c" Long="context" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>The DbContext class name (required when multiple 
DbContexts exist)</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="o" Long="output" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Output file path for the SQL script</Description>
        </Option>
      </Parameters>
    </Command>
  </Command>

install.stdout:
You can invoke the tool using the following command: dotnet-sub
Tool 'substratum.tools' (version '1.0.1') was successfully installed.
